name: Global Stock Price MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for fetching current stock prices and key data for symbols across global markets. Enables AI agents to look up the latest stock prices, market data, and financial metrics for listed companies — supporting financial research, portfolio tracking, and market analysis workflows.
use_cases: Fetching current stock prices for portfolio monitoring from financial agents
Querying stock data for financial analysis and research agents
Building market-aware AI workflows with real-time stock price context
Checking stock performance for investment decision support agents
not_for: Automated trading execution (price lookup only, not trading)
Teams requiring verified financial data with SLA guarantees
best_when: An AI assistant or financial research agent needs quick access to current stock prices across global markets — enabling market-aware conversations and financial analysis.
avoid_when: You need execution capabilities, options data, or high-frequency reliable price feeds. Also: ALWAYS verify financial data before making investment decisions.

auth.notes: Financial data API key likely required. Source API and auth method depend on implementation.

pricing.paid_tiers: Depends on underlying market data API
pricing.notes: MCP server is free open source. Underlying market data API costs vary.

performance.rate_limits: Market data API rate limits apply

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Stock prices used for investment decisions — always verify before acting
Data freshness and source quality vary — check if prices are real-time or delayed
Market data API rate limits can restrict high-frequency price queries
Community tool with educational origin — not production-grade for financial use
Global market coverage completeness should be verified for your specific markets
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Financial data used for investment decisions. Verify data source reliability. API key security. Never use unverified financial data for automated trading.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial data risk. Verify data source. API key security. No automated trading.
